channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: A vaccine for everything
item.description: "Imagine a world where vaccines can prevent not just diseases, but also allergies, addiction, and even mental health conditions. Join us as we explore the latest advancements in vaccine technology and the possibilities of a future where a vaccine can be developed for almost anything. Listen to the full discussion on The Economist's podcast: https://www.economist.com/podcasts/2026/04/01/a-vaccine-for-everything"
